message:
feat(core): add must-use enforcement and task-local error ledger (bd-hwb.14)

Error ledger provides ASX_TRY() macro for deterministic file/line/op
breadcrumbs in a zero-allocation task-local ring. ASX_MUST_USE
annotations protect transition, cleanup, and acquisition APIs.
Must-use surface manifest enumerates protected API surfaces.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
